_comment: Fleet daemon config. Copy to ~/.fleet/daemon.json and set REAL values. STERILE: base_url + tenant are REQUIRED (no defaults). Each probe is a shell command that exits 0 IFF that agent's runtime is actually running NOW. CRITICAL: a probe must detect DEATH, not just past-life — `test -f marker` passes forever once the marker exists and will heartbeat a dead agent (use a freshness/mtime check like `find ... -mmin -5`). interval_sec is clamped to [15,120] and must stay well under the pot's presence TTL (default 180s).
